name: Deutschrock - Best Of
author: Beatify Community
description: A best-of cross-section of modern German rock (Deutschrock) - from arena mainstays like Boehse Onkelz, Die Toten Hosen and Frei.Wild to underground acts like Kaerbholz, Betontod, Goitzsche Front and KneipenTerroristen.
